series_metadata.series_description: Medication orders issued by a practitioner for an inpatient; may be an original written order, a direct carbonized copy, or facsimile or such order.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: If these are the only records showing the pharmacist responsible for dispensing the drug, maintain for 3 years in a readily retrievable manner, then destroy. NOTE: By law, the facsimile shall be maintained for 3 years in a readily retrievable manner, showing positive identification of the person authorized to transmit the order and the origin of the order as part of the drug order record ; Paper: If these are the only records showing the pharmacist responsible for dispensing the drug, maintain for 3 years in a readily retrievable manner, then destroy. NOTE: By law, the facsimile shall be maintained for 3 years in a readily retrievable manner, showing positive identification of the person authorized to transmit the order and the origin of the order as part of the drug order record, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
